column1: # vendor: observability backend / cloud-native logging service
# unit: the unit of cost measurement (per_million_events for traces/logs
# cost_per_unit_usd: list price in USD per one unit
# pricing_basis: brief note on how the vendor actually bills (their native pricing unit)
# assumed_event_size_kb: assumption used to normalize GB-based pricing to per-million-events (only relevant where the vendor prices per-GB)
# All numbers are list-price approximations from publicly available pricing pages.
# Real costs differ with commitment tiers
# Intended for workshop / illustrative cost modeling
